items.raw_desc: PC tápegység Corsair WS3000:Every PC, workstation, or server needs a proper PSU to work. This humble little component is more important than you think.   Aside from supplying the electricity to the computer,  it can make your PC components last longer and save you some power. The 3000W Corsair WS3000 ensures protected conduction of electricity from the mains to individual circuits, which subsequently power the used components. The ATX PSU with a 3000 W power is designed for the highest-end gaming PCs and workstations. The Corsair unit conceals a 140mm fan that lowers the temperature and improves its service life. You can cut the power supply with a built-in switch. Modular cables keep your PC case neat and tidy.  Key Features of the 3000W Corsair WS3000 PSU ATX format is among the most popular formats available Thermal speed control keeps the Corsair WS3000 PSU from dangerously high temperature spikes You also get  a 9pc(s) serial ATA connector for connecting a SSD, HDD, or DVD drive
